description: A tag definition. Tags are defined once at the story root and referenced by ID from the tags array of any element. A tag definition provides a display name and description for what would otherwise be an opaque string.

id.description: Unique tag identifier — referenced by elements in their tags arrays

name.description: Human-readable display name of this tag

description.description: What this tag means and when to apply it
examples: The central character driving the story forward.
Anything related to the supernatural magic system of this world.

examples.name: Protagonist
examples.description: The central character whose journey drives the story.

examples.name: Magic
examples.description: Related to the supernatural magic system of this world.
